YardDefinition.title: Yard State
YardDefinition.description: Represents the active capacity and operational metrics of a single terminal or yard.

type.description: Type of the yard: BONDED, WAREHOUSE, etc.

VesselDefinition.title: Vessel State
VesselDefinition.description: Represents a container vessel docking plan element with expected time of arrival and capacity.

ChartLeftDefinition.title: Chart Left Data Item
ChartLeftDefinition.description: Data item representing weekly arrivals compared to backlogs.

ChartRightDefinition.title: Chart Right Data Item
ChartRightDefinition.description: Data item representing daily container entry logs.

type.description: Category or grouping type (A, B, or C)

ConfigDefinition.title: Global Slide Configuration
ConfigDefinition.description: Stores state variables to synchronize the dashboard aesthetic preferences, titles, and layout across refreshes.

language.description: Bilingual or native view language selection

widescreenMode.description: Locks the grid structure to native 16:9 widescreen layout

slideWidth.description: Virtual absolute slide width size in pixels

lastUpdatedBy.description: User UID who made the latest change

/yards/{yardId}.description: Database instances representing individual yards (tecon, intermaritima, etc.).

/vessels/{vesselId}.description: Database items representing active docked vessels.

/chartLeft/{itemId}.description: Database records tracking backlog forecast vs capacity metrics week over week.

/chartRight/{itemId}.description: Database records tracking daily container incoming metrics.

/config/global.description: Singleton configuration holding slide layout variables, custom watermarks, and headers.
